title: Claims Assessor
description:
about the company

Our client is a prominent insurer in Singapore with a strong focus on health and life protection. They are known for their structured training and development programs, providing a professional environment for individuals looking to apply their medical or science background within the insurance sector.

about the job

In this role, your primary focus will be the timely and accurate assessment of health insurance claims. You will ensure that each case is handled according to policy terms while maintaining consistent service standards.

Daily responsibilities include:

  • Review & Assessment: Evaluating health insurance claims to ensure they meet internal guidelines and regulatory requirements.

  • Medical Clarification: Reaching out to hospitals and clinics to obtain necessary medical information or clarify treatment details.

  • Case Enquiry & Investigation: Attending to claims investigations and following up on specific case enquiries to ensure a smooth process for all parties.

  • Service Support: Providing quality customer service by answering enquiries and effectively addressing customer complaints or feedback.

  • Operational Projects: Contributing to team-level projects, such as assisting with process improvements or supporting system updates to enhance claims efficiency.

about the manager/team

You will join a dynamic team reporting to the Team Lead for Health Claims. The team environment is professional and collaborative, focusing on accuracy and meeting operational targets. You will work alongside experienced assessors who provide a supportive network for navigating daily tasks and customer interactions.

skills and experience required

This role is well-suited for a meticulous professional with a background in life sciences and a foundational understanding of the insurance landscape.

  • Education: A Bachelor’s Degree in Biology, Life Sciences, or a related field.

  • Experience: 2 years of experience in Life and Health claims assessment.

  • Professional Qualifications: Holding industry certifications such as FLMI (Fellow, Life Management Institute) or OMA.

  • Technical Knowledge: A good understanding of human anatomy and general diseases.

  • Communication: Strong communication skills to effectively handle medical clarifications and customer interactions.

To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you may contact Hazel at +65 93884683.(EA: 94C3609/ R25158773)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED
